basic_details.organization_name: Central Council for Research in Homoeopathy (CCRH)
basic_details.short_information: The Central Council for Research in Homoeopathy (CCRH) has officially announced the Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official CCRH website. Candidates up to 35 years of age who hold a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy (minimum 55%) with two years' experience, or a Graduate degree with a one-year Diploma in Yoga (minimum 55%) and five years' experience, along with a Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate from YCB are eligible to participate in the walk-in recruitment. The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 08 July 2026, 15 July 2

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) + 2 years experience, Graduate + Diploma in Yoga (1 year, min 55%) + 5 years experience, Level IT (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB
qualification.details: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University and two years of experience in Yoga Therapy OR Any Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years of experience; Level IT (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CCRH Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download CCRH Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.central_council_for_research_in_homoeopa: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) + 2 years experience, Graduate + Diploma in Yoga (1 year, min 55%) + 5 years experience, Level IT (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB

content_sections.heading: CCRH Yoga Therapist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CCRH Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CCRH Yoga Therapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University and two years of experience in Yoga Therapy OR Any Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (one year) with 55% marks and five years of experience; Level IT (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: CCRH Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: CCRH Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Central Council for Research in Homoeopathy (CCRH) is conducting this recruitment drive for Yoga Therapist posts.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Yoga Therapist position announced by CCRH.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy (min 55%) with 2 years of experience, or a Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga (1 year, min 55%) and 5 years of experience, along with a Level IT Certificate of YCB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Yoga Therapist post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 38,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview dates are 08 July 2026, 15 July 2026, 18 July 2026, 20 July 2026, and 29 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and more details?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and other important links in the "Important Links" section of this article.
